questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: At what time between 7 O'clock and 8 O'clock, will the hands of a clock be in the same straight line but not together?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: At what time between 3 O'clock and 4 O' clock, will the hands of a clock be 4 min apart?

solutions.solution:
Method I
At 7 O'clock, minute hand is at 12 while hour hand is at 7 and both the hands are 25 min spaces apart.
To be in the same straight line (but not together) both hands will have be 30 min spaces apart.
∴ Minute hand will have to gain (30 – 25) = 5 min spaces over hour hand.
As we know, 55 min spaces are gained in 60 min.
∴ 5 min spaces will be gained in (60/55 × 5) min = 60/11 min = 5 5/11 min

Hence, the hands will be in the same straight line but not together at 5 5/11 min past 7.

Method II
In the given question, x = 7, (x + 1) = 8, x > 6
According to the formula,
Hands will be in the same straight line at (5x – 30) × 12/11 min past x = (5 × 7 – 30) × 12/11 min past 7
= (35 – 30) × 12/11 min past 7 = 5 × 12/11 min past 7 = 5 5/11 min past 7

Method I
At 3 O'clock, minute hand is 15 min spaces behind the hour hand.
Case I When the minute hand is 4 min spaces behind the hour hand.
In this case, minute hand has to gain (15 – 4) = 11 min spaces over hour hand
∴ 55 minute are gained in 60 min.
∴ 11 min are gained in 60×11/55 min = 12 min
Hence, the hands will be 4 min apart at 12 min past 3.
Case II When the minute hand is 4 min spaces ahead of the hour hand.
In this case, minute hand has to gain (15 + 4) = 19 min spaces over hour hand
∴ 55 min are gained in 60 min
∴ 19 min are gained in (60/55 × 19) min = (12 × 19)/11 min = 20 8/11 min

Hence, the hands will be 4 min apart at 20 8/11 min past 3.

Method II
Given that, x = 3, (x + 1) = 4 and f = 4
Then, according to the formula, (5x ± f) 12/11 = (5 × 3 ± 4) × 12/11 min = (15 ± 4) × 12/11 min
Separating '+' and '–' signs, we have
(15 + 4) × 12/11 min past 3 and (15 – 4) × 12/11 min past 3 = 19 × 12/11 min past 3 and 11 × 12/11 min past 3
= 20 8/11 min past 3 and 12 min past 3
